attempted_but_failed.name: trial_3
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 3 failed due to an LLM provider error — the agent never executed any commands. The fix is well-defined: patch 4 call sites in aiter_backend.py. Providing explicit step-by-step instructions.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
